brandon miller.detail: Miller suffered a head injury mid-game after an incident involving a Knicks bench player and was taken off the court for medical treatment; also reported to have undergone season-ending surgery to repair a torn ligament
brandon miller.web_narrative: Miller left the game early due to a head injury sustained during the contest, limiting him to 29 minutes. With reduced time and an injury disruption, he finished with only 1 assist against a prop of over 2.

coby white.detail: White played 17 minutes in a 121-90 blowout loss, finishing with just 4 points on 1-5 shooting
coby white.web_narrative: White badly missed his points prop (4 vs. over 10) due to a combination of cold shooting (1-5 FG) and limited opportunity in a lopsided 31-point blowout loss where starters likely saw reduced run late.

desmond bane.detail: Bane played 35 minutes with no flagged injury or exit; missed 3PM prop due to cold shooting
desmond bane.web_narrative: Bane went 0-for on three-pointers across 35 minutes despite healthy participation; no injury or situational factor explains the miss beyond a cold shooting night.

devin booker.detail: Booker played 42 minutes and was ejected with 1:04 remaining in the fourth quarter of a 111-96 win; finished with 20 points, 8 assists, 6 rebounds

jalen green.detail: Green played 40 minutes and starred with 36 points, 8-14 from three, in a 111-96 Play-In win over Golden State

kon knueppel.detail: Knueppel played 29 minutes in a blowout loss; no injury or DNP flags available from box score or external sources

lamelo ball.detail: Ball played 25 minutes in a 121-90 blowout loss, contributing 23 points and 5 assists; reduced minutes consistent with garbage-time management in a lopsided game

miles bridges.detail: Bridges played 28 minutes in a blowout loss; no injury or DNP flags available from box score or external sources

stephen curry.detail: Curry played 36 minutes in the Play-In loss to Phoenix; no injury or DNP flags available from external sources
